title: Adventures of Red Ryder
writer: Fred Harman, Franklin Adreon, Ronald Davidson
actors: Don 'Red' Barry, Noah Beery, Tommy Cook
plot: Chapter One MURDER ON THE SANTA FE TRAIL - Mesquite banker Calvin Drake (Harry Worth) plans to profit from the Santa Fe Railroad's acquisition of right-of-way by gaining control of the land in the territory. In the ensuing war of ...
